productDisplayName: Flying Machine Women Veron Grey Jeans
description: Composition Washed grey skinny jeans made of 65.5% cotton, 32.4% polyester and 2.1% spandex, has two insert pockets on the front side, two patch pockets on the back with thread detailing, brand patch appliqued on the waistband at the back and metal zipper and button closure Fit Low-rise, skinny fit Wash care Machine wash cold water Do not tumble dry Turn inside out before drying Don't dry in direct sunlight Use warm iron Do not iron on print If you're a denim person, these washed grey skinny jeans from flying machine will delight you. Low-rise, with a great skinny fit, you might not want to take them off once you pull them on! Perfect companion for your t-shirts and sexy tops.
